summary: Tested DineMobilePage and EmergencyMobilePage at 390px viewport. All 6 test scenarios passed. The PetFriendlySpots import fix (line 40 DineMobilePage.jsx) is confirmed working — no 'Can't find variable: PetFriendlySpots' error. Both pages render PillarHero correctly with THE DOGGY COMPANY label, pet avatar with soul ring, and pillar-specific styling.

Both pages render correctly at 390px. The only console errors are pre-existing 'Failed to fetch pets' network errors (unrelated to fix).
